sources.title: Psycho Roommate | Full Movie | Survival Thriller
sources.description:
Jill is obsessed with her new roommate Jennifer, a promiscuous and sexy hotshot in the LA Fashion scene. Her jealousy and rage spiral out of control -- Jennifer has everything, and Jill wants to be just like her. If Jill cannot BE Jennifer, she must destroy her.
2015.  Stars: Effie Lavore, Mary Loveless, Wes McGee

metadata.Plot: After discovering her fiancé's infidelity, lawyer Jasmin starts over in a new house and takes in a seemingly mild-mannered roommate, Simone. The new addition is not as she appears, and attempts to kill Jasmin and assume her identity.
metadata.Actors: Kris D'Sha, Aneisha Brackens, Jahi Minkah Trotter
